seoTitle: Heathpool vs Hendon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Heathpool and Hendon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Heathpool and Hendon.
heading: Heathpool vs Hendon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Heathpool, South Australia and Hendon, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hendon has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Heathpool (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Heathpool or Hendon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Heathpool has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Hendon scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Heathpool scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Hendon scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Heathpool or Hendon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hendon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
